revision.comment: Redirecting to [[Template talk:Category series navigation]] to avoid decentralized discussion
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module talk:Category series navigation/styles.css]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module talk:Category series navigation/styles.css]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Wikipedia overwrites]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Module talk:Category series navigation/styles.css]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Module talk:Category series navigation/styles.css]]</includeonly> <noinclude></noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no qid-linked ja/en/simple source); add local discussion section + dated import note [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22783740998|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-03-06 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:EmmaBot|EmmaBot]] ([[User talk:EmmaBot|talk]]) 22:49, 6 March 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:EmmaBot|EmmaBot]] ([[User talk:EmmaBot|talk]]) 22:49, 6 March 2026 (UTC) <!-- No source talk page found via linked QID sitelinks (ja/en/simple) at migration time. -->
